data.title: Binance Alpha will list Genius Foundation (GENIUS) on April 13th.
data.description: According to official sources, Binance Alpha will list the Genius Foundation (GENIUS) on April 13th. Eligible users can claim airdrops using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after trading opens on Alpha. Further details will be announced separately.

data.title: Elon Musk Launches XChat Messaging App
data.description: Elon Musk, the billionaire CEO of X (formerly Twitter), Tesla, and SpaceX, announced the launch of a new messaging application called XChat on Sunday. According to Jin10, the app features end-to-end encryption, no advertisements, and no tracking. XChat has undergone nearly a year of testing and iteration since its initial beta testing in May 2025. This development comes almost four years after Musk acquired Twitter in 2022 with the ambition of creating a Western version of WeChat.

data.title: Bittensor co-founders accuse Covenant AI founders of betraying the community and plan to introduce a "lock-up staking" mechanism to strengthen governance.
data.description: Bittensor co-founder Jacob Robert Steeves responded to the Covenant AI incident, stating that the events of the past few days have "deeply shaken" him. He accused Covenant AI founder Samuel Dare of severely damaging the protocol and community, betraying the trust of investors and users, and abetting everyone. He also apologized to users who suffered losses as a result of the incident. Steeves stated that Bittensor was designed to combat greed and selfishness in human nature, promoting AI ownership by all participants through a permissionless mechanism. He emphasized that while this incident exposed system vulnerabilities, it will also prompt the protocol and community to further strengthen their resilience. Regarding future directions, Steeves proposed advancing the "Locked Stake" mechanism, introducing a "time + staking" commitment dimension at the protocol layer to improve transparency and investor protection, and reduce similar risks. He pointed out that this solution was originally designed with Samuel Dare's participation. Furthermore, he stated that development related to subnets 3, 39, and 81 will continue through the community, and the overall functionality and vision will remain unchanged. Steeves emphasized that Bittensor remains one of the most decentralized AI protocols currently available, and will continue to drive the development of open AI, with plans to move towards larger-scale model training. The future goal is to train a model with one trillion parameters.

data.title: RAVE Surges Over 40% Before Settling at $2.40
data.description: RAVE experienced a significant price increase, surging over 40% to reach $2.97, according to NS3.AI. The cryptocurrency later adjusted to a trading price of $2.40.

data.title: RAVE surged over 40% in a short period, reaching a high of $2.97.
data.description: Market data shows that RAVE surged more than 40% in a short period, reaching a high of $2.97, and is currently trading at $2.40.

data.title: XChat to Launch on App Store with Enhanced Privacy Features
data.description: XChat is scheduled to debut on the App Store on April 17, following nearly a year of testing and development. According to NS3.AI, the app emphasizes user privacy with features such as end-to-end encryption, no advertisements, and no tracking.

data.title: RAVE Experiences Significant Short-Term Surge
data.description: RAVE has experienced a notable increase in its value, with a short-term surge of over 40%, reaching a peak of $2.97. According to Odaily, the current price stands at $2.4.

data.title: Ethereum's Upcoming Glamsterdam Upgrade Progresses Amid Development Challenges
data.description:
Ethereum Foundation has released its latest development update, indicating steady progress in the upcoming Glamsterdam upgrade. According to Foresight News, while the implementation of ePBS (protocol-level PBS) is complex, the related development network is stabilizing, and the block-level access lists (BALs) development network is advancing smoothly. The current goal is to launch the first generalized Glamsterdam development network next week if the ePBS development network remains stable, followed by client releases, security audits, and test network testing. Additionally, EIP-7954, aimed at increasing the maximum contract size, is likely to be prioritized.

The subsequent Hegotá upgrade has selected FOCIL (EIP-7805) as the core feature for the consensus layer, while the proposal for account abstraction (AA), EIP-8141, remains in a pending introduction (CFI) status due to lack of consensus. Non-core feature proposals for Hegotá were initiated on April 9. Regarding the network gas limit, the current benchmark target is set at 60 million, with higher limit testing ongoing. As for the upgrade timeline, Glamsterdam is unlikely to go live in the second quarter, and the progress of Hegotá will largely depend on the completion of the former.

data.title: Two whales amassed Trump's luncheon with Trump, one holding $3.2 million worth of Trumps.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, whales are accumulating TRUMP for Trump's luncheon. In the past two days, one whale withdrew 850,400 TRUMP from Bybit, worth $2.4 million. Seventeen hours ago, another whale withdrew 105,700 TRUMP from Binance, worth $298,000, and currently holds 1.13 million TRUMP, worth $3.2 million.

data.title: Whales Accumulate TRUMP Tokens Ahead of Trump Luncheon
data.description: On April 12, two significant cryptocurrency holders have been accumulating TRUMP tokens in anticipation of a luncheon with U.S. President Donald Trump. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Whale 8DHkza has withdrawn 850,488 TRUMP tokens from a centralized exchange over the past two days. Meanwhile, Whale 7EtuAt extracted 105,754 TRUMP tokens from another centralized exchange 17 hours ago, bringing their total holdings to 1.13 million TRUMP tokens.

data.title: XRP Declines 1.7% as Analysts Debate Future Price Movement
data.description: XRP experienced a 1.7% decline over a 24-hour period, dropping from $1.36 to $1.33 in a matter of minutes during late trading. According to NS3.AI, this movement has positioned $1.35 as a new resistance level. Analysts are divided on whether XRP will face further declines or begin a broader recovery.

data.title: Opinion: If BTC breaks through $76,000 and ETH breaks through $2,400, a bullish trend may emerge.
data.description: Macro investor Jordi Visser says Bitcoin and Ethereum are not far from key price levels that could signal a trend reversal this year, despite a growing consensus in the industry that the market has entered a bear market cycle. He stated, "If Bitcoin breaks $76,000 and Ethereum breaks $2,400, I think that would be the start of a sustainable uptrend this year, because I don't think there will be a recession." Visser also said, "I think inflation will remain high, and people will need to look for profitable assets in a world where the S&P 500 isn't rising." The prediction market Kalshi currently prices a 24% probability of a recession in 2026, a 10 percentage point decrease from the past 30 days. Visser's view contrasts with the growing pessimism in the crypto industry—some even predicting Bitcoin will fall below its year-to-date low of $60,000 on February 6th. Veteran trader Peter Brandt stated on March 31 that Bitcoin may retest or even "slightly below" that price level in September or October this year, which would mark the low point of this bear market. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Elon Musk's "Western WeChat," XChat, will officially launch on the App Store on April 17.
data.description: XChat, a social application under the X platform, officially announced that it will be officially launched on the App Store on April 17. The application focuses on end-to-end encryption, no ads, and no tracking. Since its internal beta testing in May 2025, XChat has undergone nearly a year of testing and iteration; if we count from the moment Musk acquired Twitter in 2022 with the ambition to create a Western version of WeChat, it has been almost four years.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ether Prices Could Signal Sustainable Growth, Says Analyst
data.description: Macro analyst Jordi Visser has suggested that Bitcoin surpassing $76,000 and Ether exceeding $2,400 might indicate the beginning of a sustainable upward trend this year. According to NS3.AI, Visser expressed confidence in the market's resilience, noting that he does not foresee a recession. Additionally, data from the United States Bureau of Labor Statistics revealed that the Consumer Price Index (CPI) for April increased by 3.3% compared to the previous year.

data.title: Israel assesses that the US-Iran ceasefire may be extended to allow for continued engagement between the two sides.
data.description: According to Israeli media reports on the 12th, after the failure of negotiations between the United States and Iran to reach an agreement, Israel assesses that the US-Iran ceasefire may be extended to allow the two sides to continue contact. (Xinhua)

data.title: Planet Midday News
data.description: 1. ETH has fallen 55% from its all-time high; 2. Iran negotiations face uncertainty, with Trump hinting at a possible "naval blockade"; 3. Sky co-founder Rune closed his 7x leveraged short position in the Nasdaq 100, resulting in an overall portfolio return of -22.68%; 4. WLFI co-founder responds to recent criticisms: WLFI is unrelated to projects or entities such as TRUMP meme or CIC Digital Company, and its main product is the USD1 stablecoin, not transaction fees; 5. Polymarket's probability of "the conflict between Iran and Israel/the US ending before April 15" drops to 47%, down 22% in 24 hours; 6. Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson: Iran and the US have disagreements on two or three important issues; 7. Machi Dage's 13-game winning streak is broken, resulting in a $192,000 loss from closing his BTC long position.

data.title: Foreign media revealed details of the US-Iran negotiations: Iranian representatives were all dressed in black, and emotions fluctuated between the two sides.
data.description: The talks in Islamabad marked the first direct meeting between the US and Iran in over a decade, and the highest-level consultations between the two countries since the 1979 Iranian Islamic Revolution. The Iranian delegation arrived in Islamabad early on the 11th, dressed entirely in black to commemorate Supreme Leader Khamenei and other victims of the war. The Iranian government stated that the delegation also carried shoes and schoolbags belonging to students who were killed in a US bombing of a school adjacent to military facilities. Another Pakistani source, commenting on the first round of talks, said, "Emotions fluctuated between the two sides; the atmosphere was sometimes tense, sometimes relaxed." (Reference News)

data.title: Iran negotiations take an unexpected turn as Trump hints at a possible "naval blockade."
data.description: US President Trump retweeted an article titled "If Iran Doesn't Compromise, the President Holds a Trump Trump Card: A Maritime Blockade," and copied and posted the article. The article stated, "If Iran refuses to accept the final agreement proposed by the US on Saturday, Trump can choose to bomb Iran back to the 'Stone Age,' as he vowed. Or, he might resort to the (maritime) blockade strategy that was successful before (in Venezuela)." (Jin Shi)

data.title: ETH has fallen 55% from its all-time high.
data.description: ETH has fallen 55% from ATH. OKX market data shows that ETH is currently trading at $2212, with its all-time high being $4957 on August 25, 2025.

data.title: Stablecoin Transaction Volume Projected to Surge by 2035
data.description: Chainalysis has projected a significant increase in the inflation-adjusted real economic transaction volume of stablecoins, estimating a rise from $28 trillion in 2025 to $719 trillion by 2035. According to NS3.AI, this growth could see stablecoin payment processing volumes reaching parity with Visa between 2031 and 2039.
